heading: Required Access
body:
To view collections with slow queries and see suggested indexes, you must have
[Project Read Only](<Project Read Only>) access or higher to the project.

To view field values in a sample query in
the Performance Advisor, you must have [Project Observability Viewer](<Project Observability Viewer>),
[Project Data Access Read Only](<Project Data Access Read Only>),
[Project Data Access Read/Write](<Project Data Access Read/Write>), or
[Project Data Access Admin](<Project Data Access Admin>) access to the project.

To enable or disable the Atlas-managed slow operation threshold,
you must have [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) access to the project. Users
with [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) access must add themselves to the
project as a `Project Owner`.
